dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: NOW, THIS IS GONNA BE FUN!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WELL, RUN AWAY IF YOU CAN!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: RUNNING AWAY IS ONLY FOR WHEN THE ENEMY IS STRONGER THAN ONESELF, NO?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: AMAZING! THEY'RE BOTH EXTREMELY STRONG!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: BUT, HEY GUYS,

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: AM I OUT OF YOUR LEAGUE?

dialogue.speaker: Rak
dialogue.line: COWARDLY TURTLES! STOP HIDING!! YOU DAMN TURTLES! COME OUT HERE RIGHT NOW!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: NICE.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HE'S GONE CRAZY. LET'S HIDE IN HERE UNTIL THE TEST IS OVER.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: AH, OK.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHY IS THAT CROCODILE THING FOLLOWING YOU? DID YOU DO SOMETHING TO HIM?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: WHAT? NO, HE JUST...

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: HE SAID HE WANTED TO FIGHT WITH THIS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT, THAT NEEDLE?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: "BLACK MARCH"?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH, DO YOU KNOW WHAT IT IS? IT MUST BE REALLY FAMOUS.

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: YOU, WHERE DID YOU GET THAT?

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: THAT WEAPON IS A PERSONAL TREASURE FROM JAHAD, THE KING OF THE TOWER, GIVEN ONLY TO HIS CHOSEN DAUGHTER. IT... IT'S... ORDINARY RANKERS SPEND THEIR WHOLE LIVES WITHOUT SEEING IT. HOW COME A REGULAR NEW TO THE TOWER HAS SUCH A WEAPON? BESIDES, YOU'RE A GUY. YOU... WHO ARE YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: OOPS.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I'M JUST AN ORDINARY...

dialogue.speaker: Rak
dialogue.line: DAMN IT! I SAVED YOUR LIFE AND I GET NOTHING IN RETURN! HOW STINGY! IT'S, IT'S JUST,

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: WHAT, WHAT IS THIS GUY? WEIRD. HE'S TOO WEAK TO BE A REGULAR, AND HE DOESN'T SEEM TO KNOW ANYTHING ABOUT THE TOWER. BUT HE HAS THE BLACK MARCH...

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: I THOUGHT HE WAS TOO ORDINARY TO BE A REGULAR, BUT I GOT IT WRONG. HE'S THE MOST UNUSUAL AMONG THE REGULARS HERE. INTERESTING. HE'S... HE IS DEFINITELY USEFUL. I NEED TO KEEP HIM CLOSE.

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: MY NAME IS KHUN. KHUN AGUERO AGNES. AND YOURS IS?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: BAM. TWENTY-FIFTH BAM.

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: HM, WHAT A UNIQUE NAME. OK, BAM, I'M SURE YOU DON'T TRUST ME RIGHT NOW. THAT IS VERY NATURAL, BECAUSE THE RULE OF THIS TEST IS TO FIGHT AND COMPETE TO MOVE UP. IT IS NATURAL FOR YOU NOT TO TRUST ME.

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: BUT, I DON'T CARE ABOUT THE RULES ANYMORE. I'VE DECIDED, BECAUSE, TO GO UP THE TOWER WITH YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: H-KUK...? Y-Y-YOU! YOU WANNA GO UP THE TOWER WITH ME?! I'M NOT GOOD AT FIGHTING, I KNOW NOTHING. I WON'T BE ANY HELP.

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: IT'S OK. YOU WILL BE FUN TO HANG OUT WITH.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: KUK? FUN? FUN?

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: FOR FUN-WISE, I THINK HE'S THE BEST.

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: HM, HE DEFINITELY HAS A KNACK FOR IT, BUT HE LOOKS A BIT STUPID. HE DOESN'T SEEM TO KNOW YET WHAT IT MEANS IN THIS TOWER TO HAVE THE BLACK MARCH.

dialogue.speaker: Khun
dialogue.line: BUT IS THAT CROCODILE OBSESSED WITH HIM BECAUSE HE KNOWS IT'S THE BLACK MARCH? WHO IS HE, BY THE WAY? PROBABLY NOT.

dialogue.speaker: Rak
dialogue.line: HEY, I'M LEAVING.

dialogue.speaker: Rak
dialogue.line: I SAID I'M LEAVING.

summary: The episode opens with intense fighting observed by unknown characters. Rak, a crocodile-like character, expresses frustration at others hiding. Khun confronts Bam about his mysterious weapon, the 'Black March,' and, recognizing Bam's unusual nature and potential usefulness, decides to accompany him up the Tower. Rak, seemingly fed up, declares he is leaving.
